title: macrolobium colombianum var. metaense
intro: Macrolobium colombianum var. metaense is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as a legume tree native to Colombia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Macrolobium colombianum var. metaense include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as wound healing and skin care. Herbal preparations of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm the effectiveness and safety of these uses.
